description: An Operations Manager needs to review the accuracy of digital wait-time boards. Process the raw queue operations dataset located at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/wait_times_july_week1.csv and save the analysis to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/theme_park_queue_analysis.xlsx. The workbook must include a 'Raw Data' sheet with a 'Wait_Discrepancy' column (posted_wait_mins - actual_wait_mins) that handles blank actual wait times, a 'Ride Summary' sheet calculating the average posted wait, average actual wait, and average wait discrepancy for all 5 rides, and an 'Hourly Profile' sheet calculating the park-wide average actual wait time grouped by hour_of_day (9 through 22) with the peak congestion hour formatted to stand out.

metadata.data_source: Derived from TouringPlans historical queue data, July 2019
